assertions.description: Q13-Q16 (BSS138) are classic MOSFET bidirectional level shifters (AN10441 topology). Gate tied to lower voltage rail (+3V3), drain on HV side with pull-up, source on LV side with pull-up. The analyzer detects them as transistor circuits but does not recognize the level-shifter pattern. No level_shifter signal path category exists.

REVIEW: Q13-Q16 each show gate_resistors including R48, R14, R17, R19, R15, R3, R9. Only R3 (for Q13) or the local pull-up is the actual gate-related resistor. The others are on the +3V3 power rail net and have no functional relationship to the gate drive of these MOSFETs.
